hero.slogan1: 我们致力于创造品质，创造快乐
hero.slogan2: We are committed to creating quality and happiness

about.p1: Founded in 2013, Hummingbird Interactive is an innovative technology company focusing on digital intelligence tech.
about.p2: We reconstruct industry efficiency with AI, activate industrial value with digital twins, and unlock new offline entertainment with MR.
about.p3: We are committed to every industrial scenario—whether enterprise decision-making, physical operations, or consumer experience
about.p4: To create a smarter, more immersive, and valuable digital future for our clients.

cases.c1_desc: Centered on enterprise-level AI base, building agents, robots, and personalized education solutions.
cases.c2_desc: Centered on enterprise-level AI base, building agents, robots, and personalized education solutions.
cases.c3_desc: Reconstructing tourism boundaries with tech, connecting online cloud content with offline immersive scenes.
cases.c4_desc: MR tech meets trendy IP, creating a new entertainment ecology of immersive battles and social interaction.

partners.title: Partners
partners.desc: Establishing long-term strategic partnerships with famous enterprises

ai_page.hero_desc: Full-stack self-dev · Multi-modal fusion · Low-code dev · Industry knowledge · Secure & Controllable.
ai_page.intro_p1: Centered on full-stack AI tech, building an enterprise AI base covering 'compute-algorithm-data'.
ai_page.intro_p2: Relying on self-developed large models and modular architecture to provide deep customized smart solutions.
ai_page.intro_p3: Making AI move from the 'laboratory' to the 'production line' as the core engine driving growth.
ai_page.case1_desc: Say goodbye to tedious data processing and manual analysis. Compress the decision-making cycle from 'days' to 'hours'.
ai_page.case1_l1: Auto collection & fusion of multi-source data
ai_page.feature1_desc:
Deeply understands business logic, automatically integrates multi-source heterogeneous data.
From market trend research to efficiency optimization, providing full-link support for enterprise decision-makers.
ai_page.case2_desc: Reshaping financial service processes with 'unmanned, intelligent, and precise' technologies to improve customer response speed.
ai_page.feature2_desc:
An intelligent service robot matrix integrating voice recognition, intent understanding, and financial knowledge graphs.
Covers core scenarios such as smart customer service and wealth management.
ai_page.case3_desc: Adapting to children's individual development differences with AI, cultivating learning interests in fun interactions.
ai_page.feature3_desc:
Based on brain science and cognitive development theory, creating an immersive learning experience through multi-modal interaction tech.
Auto-pushing picture books and games based on children's interests.
ai_page.eco_desc: From base layer construction to scenario applications, joining hands to build tailored AI solutions.
ai_page.cta_desc: Contact us to get professional solutions

digital_page.hero_title:
Integration of Digital & Real
Digital Twin Drives Industrial Upgrading
digital_page.hero_desc:
Through cutting-edge digital twin solutions, we build fully synchronized virtual mirrors for enterprises
Achieving a comprehensive intelligent upgrade from perception to cognition
digital_page.intro_p1: When physical entities meet digital mirrors, when industrial operations integrate with real-time simulation
digital_page.intro_p2: With 'Data + Industry' as the core, we build a full-link digital twin system
digital_page.intro_p3: Relying on high-precision reproduction and dynamic data driven, creating a 1:1 precise mapping digital base
digital_page.intro_p4: Shifting industries from 'passive response' to 'active prediction', realizing smart upgrading
digital_page.m1_desc: Multi-physics coupling algorithm / High-precision 3D reconstruction / Millimeter-level reproduction
digital_page.m3_desc: Receive the latest data in milliseconds and trigger business logic operations immediately
digital_page.cat_ind_desc: Using digital models to reproduce, predict, and optimize the entire physical production lifecycle
digital_page.case_ind_1_desc: 3D interactive virtual port, factory area, and related facilities, including docks, shipping terminals...
digital_page.case_ind_2_title: Poly Abu Dhabi Military Exhibition Visual System
digital_page.case_ind_2_desc: Showcasing the latest technological R&D achievements and innovations of military enterprises to overseas users.
digital_page.case_ind_3_title: Military Museum Liaoning Ship VR Display Platform
digital_page.case_ind_3_desc: True-to-scale restoration of the Liaoning ship structure. View the VR roaming experience from a first-person perspective.
digital_page.case_ind_4_desc: Realistically simulating the assembly process of automated robots, allowing operators to conduct intuitive operation.
digital_page.case_ind_5_desc: A set of visual guidance systems for flexible line assembly, integrating quality data collection.
digital_page.cat_emg_desc: Full-cycle management and technical practice for sudden public events
digital_page.case_emg_1_title: Global Earthquake Disaster Geological Drill System
digital_page.case_emg_1_desc: Simulating various earthquake disaster scenarios and geological changes to provide a realistic drill environment.
digital_page.case_emg_2_title: Guangzhou Safety and Emergency Education System
digital_page.case_emg_2_desc: Targeting disaster scenes, realizing emergency safety education through content display and process demonstration.
digital_page.cat_city_desc: Deeply embedding digital infrastructure into physical city mechanisms to achieve real-time perception of city signs.
digital_page.case_city_1_title: Water Conservancy Institute Digital Twin Platform
digital_page.case_city_1_desc: Displaying and analyzing the joint dispatching of water conservancy projects. Processing BIM model data.
digital_page.case_city_2_desc: Building a digital twin of the virtual network to map and monitor actual network operation status in real-time.
digital_page.case_city_3_title: Tiantongyuan Smart Community Comprehensive Management Platform
digital_page.case_city_3_desc: The Tiantongyuan smart community system platform includes property management software, smart community applications, smart park applications, community management systems, owner management systems, parking lot systems, energy consumption management systems, smart inspection systems, smart access control and lighting, and cloud call centers. With advanced technology and user-friendly design, it provides strong support for creating a comfortable, safe, and intelligent community environment.
digital_page.cta_desc: Work together to create high-precision, high-value digital twin solutions

tourism_page.hero_title:
Smart Tourism
Reconstructing New Boundaries of Experience
tourism_page.hero_desc:
Activating tourism resources with digital technology, connecting online cloud games with offline immersive scenes
Making culture 'alive' and travel 'trendy'
tourism_page.intro_p1: When cultural heritage meets digital technology, when travel experience integrates with smart innovation
tourism_page.intro_p2: With 'Tech + Tourism' as the core, we open up online and offline scenes, creating a full-chain tourism service integrating immersive experience, digital communication, and creative shooting.
tourism_page.intro_p3: Making tourism resources 'alive' and travel experience 'trendy'
tourism_page.m1_desc: Multi-physics coupling algorithm / High-precision 3D reconstruction / Millimeter-level reproduction
tourism_page.m3_desc: Receive the latest data in milliseconds and trigger business logic operations immediately
tourism_page.m4_desc: Multi-modal perception (visual, auditory, tactile) and spatial computing
tourism_page.cat_online_desc: Information carriers produced, stored, and transmitted in digital form through networks, the most basic unit in digital space.
tourism_page.case_on_1_desc: Restoring the natural landscape and blocks of Nanxun Ancient Town, users can explore ancient town culture and architecture in this digital world. Combining online metaverse with offline entities using AR/VR/AI tech.
tourism_page.case_on_2_desc: Built with not only traditional offline shopping scenes but also virtual roaming and virtual product displays, breaking space constraints to provide 24/7 shopping services.
tourism_page.case_on_3_title: Guijiu Group - 17 Light Years Metaverse - Private Domain Commercial Metaverse
tourism_page.case_on_3_desc: Guided by QR codes, users can transparently enter the metaverse world as digital humans and guests. Interacting with friends, experiencing brand stories, and participating in various fun activities.
tourism_page.case_on_4_desc: An innovative virtual music feast combining VR and blockchain technology, allowing users to immerse themselves in the music feast as virtual avatars.
tourism_page.case_on_5_title: Dinosaur Theme Park Online Digital Metaverse
tourism_page.case_on_5_desc: Relying on rich dinosaur cultural resources, building a 'Geek Village' digital tourism new city, combining digital technology and the metaverse to build an immersive Cretaceous experience.
tourism_page.case_on_6_desc: 3D display of artwork in a 720-degree virtual space, with public interactive reviews and a derivative mall providing rich art derivative transactions.
tourism_page.cat_offline_desc: Digital information carriers integrated into physical spaces, presented on terminal devices, and supporting real-time on-site interaction.
tourism_page.case_off_1_desc: A brand new tourism experience project launched by the Guangyuan Cultural and Tourism Department in 2024. Centered on smart micro-view, focusing on VR, simulation, and holographic displays.
tourism_page.case_off_2_title: VR Town - VR Roaming Huangshan + AR Museum
tourism_page.case_off_2_desc: A digital tourism project led by the Huangshan District Government. Combining local culture and resources, bringing tourists into game scenes from a first-person perspective.
tourism_page.case_off_3_title: Digital Upgrade of Aerospace Science and Technology Museum
tourism_page.case_off_3_desc: As a significant aerospace science popularization base, it covers multiple exhibition areas, presenting a half-century of China's glorious aerospace development history.
tourism_page.case_off_4_title: Wulong Fairy Mountain Tree New Tech Empowered Digital Ecology
tourism_page.case_off_4_desc: The first micro-terrain digital ecological exploration experience center in China, dedicated to building the first metaverse immersive cultural and commercial new holy land in China.
tourism_page.case_off_5_desc: Creating a lifelike underwater world, leading audiences into an ocean ecological environment full of life. The marine landscape includes colorful coral reefs, swimming turtles, and schools of fish.
tourism_page.case_off_6_title: Sanya Xintou - VR Experience Pavilion - Digital Micro Giant
tourism_page.case_off_6_desc: A leading large-space multiplayer interactive VR theme park in China, combining scenic spot culture with multiple VR interactive entertainment products.
tourism_page.case_off_7_title: Sanya Xintou - VR Experience Pavilion - Luobi Cave
tourism_page.case_off_7_desc: Providing content production for the core VR theme park created by Sanya Xintou, focusing on presenting Sanya's Luobi Cave culture using advanced all-in-one VR tech.
tourism_page.case_off_8_desc: Centered on immersive digital content, creating a fascinating virtual underwater world, allowing tourists to travel back to the spectacular landscape of the ancient Jurassic period.
tourism_page.case_off_9_desc: A leading large-space, immersive, multiplayer mobile VR offline experience in China. A highly free virtual world where players can role-play like in an RPG.
tourism_page.case_off_10_desc: Smart AR navigation system, providing physical interaction information, commercial recommendations, and dynamic route planning through positioning fusion tech.
tourism_page.case_off_11_title: Cultural Museum Navigation and Explanation Interaction
tourism_page.case_off_11_desc: 3D virtual tour guide providing anthropomorphic interactive answers and directions. Combined with high-precision dynamic route guidance and cultural relic recognition tech.
tourism_page.cat_shoot_desc: The process of converting visual images into electronic signals or digital assets, the basic collection link of image content production.
tourism_page.case_sh_1_title: Neta Auto - AR Live Virtual Online Launch
tourism_page.case_sh_1_desc: Online launch of Neta U/S/V models, synthesizing the virtual launch stage built with 3D tech with real human images. Mapping real shot vehicle data into the stage.
tourism_page.case_sh_2_desc: 360° VR panoramic Mobile Suit Girl reload launch display, relying on advanced VR tech to create a realistic interstellar world for players.
tourism_page.case_sh_3_desc: On-site AR special effects display vehicle wind resistance effects, showing aerodynamic performance and stability in dynamic scenes, demonstrating technical strength.
tourism_page.case_sh_4_title: Jackson Yee 18th Birthday - Dancing with Digital Human 'Red Bean'
tourism_page.case_sh_4_desc: At Jackson Yee's 18th birthday concert, through real-time motion capture and facial capture tech, Jackson Yee cooperated perfectly with the digital human 'Red Bean'.
tourism_page.cta_desc: Work with us to create the next generation of smart tourism experiences

entertainment_page.hero_desc:
Integrating virtual interaction with physical sports, creating a healthy, trendy,
and sticky digital sports ecosystem for the global youth through simple operations and rich gameplay.
entertainment_page.intro_p1: When MR technology meets trendy genes, when sports vitality merges with social fun.
entertainment_page.intro_p2: POONG! focuses on 'MR + Offline + IP' to create a new entertainment ecosystem integrating immersive battles, trendy social interaction, and light sports.
entertainment_page.intro_p3: Breaking the boundaries of offline entertainment imagination, bringing 'happiness in motion' to users and opening new tracks for business partners.
entertainment_page.easy_desc:
No complex wearables, just an MR headset to start the battle! Wave to shoot energy bubbles,
move your body to dodge attacks. Quick to learn, instant immersion for everyone from families to trendy youth.
entertainment_page.battle_sub: Wave to attack, move to dodge, randomly generated power-ups and defensive covers
entertainment_page.battle_desc:
1v1, 2v2, 3v3
Short-time high-frequency sports, 2 minutes a round, combining fitness and entertainment
entertainment_page.eco_l1: One-click booking via Mini Program, check national real-time rankings, interact with likes, and accumulate private traffic.
entertainment_page.eco_l2: Live screen broadcast of battle scenes, supporting network-wide streaming, making every battle the focus of the social circle.
entertainment_page.eco_l3: Quarterly season settlement, top players win limited edition trendy rewards.
entertainment_page.sol_sub: Low threshold investment, standardized output, fast return
entertainment_page.coop_1_desc:
Zero-cost upgrade for existing VR stores
Introducing POONG! content ecosystem
entertainment_page.coop_2_desc:
Full set of standardized operation system output
Nanny-style opening guidance
entertainment_page.coop_3_desc:
Exclusive regional protection
Enjoy high rewards for store expansion and revenue sharing
entertainment_page.ip_desc:
POONG! builds an exclusive worldview and original IP cluster.
A group of 'Bubble Friends' born from absurd experiments, with distinct personalities of 'narcissism, silly cuteness, irritability, and fun',
becoming virtual partners in game battles and protagonists of offline trendy toys.
entertainment_page.deriv_desc: Developed a full range of peripheral products based on IP including limited edition figures, blind boxes, action figures, keychains, and trendy stickers.
entertainment_page.promo_desc: Pico Enterprise MR Headset*4 | Pico Exclusive Power Bank*4 | PC Server*1 Router*1 | 65-inch Projector*1 | Cashier POS*1 | Speaker*1
entertainment_page.shop1_desc: No backpack · No vest · Zero restraint
entertainment_page.shop2_desc: Team Competitive / Battle Royale / Group Monster Fighting
entertainment_page.cta_desc: Make sports more fun, make entertainment healthier

contact_page.hero_desc: Look forward to creating infinite possibilities with you
contact_page.bj_add: Zone A, No.1 Banbidian Cultural Industry Park, Gaobeidian Road, Chaoyang District, Beijing
